prevalence.source: Pediatric gastroenterology and IBD registry syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to growth impact and chronic disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical symptoms plus endoscopy with biopsy; imaging for small bowel; exclude infections (TB, enteric pathogens)

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; access to pediatric IBD specialists varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Pediatric gastroenterology services mostly in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Steroids for flares, immunomodulators, biologics for moderate-severe disease, nutritional support
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited pediatric IBD centers and biologic access
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing pediatric GI services in major metros
